title: BEM-840 route after 839

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
if not missing:
    status='next_process_real_claude_response'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif missing[0]=='workflow_dispatch_results':
    status='next_repair_dispatch_results'
    next_action='inspect queue processor result writer and force result status file for dispatch attempt'
elif missing[0]=='claude_runtime_state':
    status='next_repair_claude_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch result, verify dispatcher workflow was triggered, patch runtime state writer'
elif missing[0]=='real_claude_response':
    status='next_repair_real_claude_response'
    next_action='patch Claude prompt/provider response writer and retry mailbox answer'
else:
    status='next_unknown_missing_proof'
    next_action='diagnose unknown missing proof '+str(missing)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':status_in,'bem839_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Route After BEM-839 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'BEM-839 missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json','governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-839 by selecting the first missing smoke proof and creating a concrete next action')
